evidence_paragraphs.snippet: [Brienne](wiki:Brienne_of_Tarth) fluctuates between a fever dream and semi-consciousness, as the outlaws transport her severely injured body to Lady [Stoneheart](wiki:Catelyn_Stark). While she is...

Before long, Brienne is brought before Lady Stoneheart, where she as well as [Pod](wiki:Podrick_Payne) and Ser [Hyle](wiki:Hyle_Hunt) will be judged. Brienne cannot see Stoneheart's face, but notices...
